ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pump_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., Rolling Stdev) */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "flow_meter_1" REAL /* Flow measured by the first volumetric flow meter */,
  "flow_meter_2" REAL /* Flow measured by the second volumetric flow meter */,
  "pump_speed_rpm" REAL /* Speed of the pump in RPM */,
  "pump_torque" REAL /* Torque applied by the pump */,
  "ambient_temp" REAL /* Ambient temperature at the time of measurement */,
  "horse_power" REAL /* Horsepower of the pump */,
  "pump_efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the pump */,
  "pump_failure" INTEGER /* Indicator of pump failure (1 for failure, 0 for operational) */,
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pump */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the pump */,
  "fluid_type" TEXT /* Type of fluid being pumped */,
  "operating_pressure" REAL /* Operating pressure of the pump */,
  "vibration_level" REAL /* Vibration level of the pump */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator on duty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pump_data_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pump_data_pump_id FOREIGN KEY ("pump_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pumps" (
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pump */,
  "pump_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the pump */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the pump was installed */,
  "pump_type" TEXT /* Type of the pump (e.g., centrifugal, positive displacement) */,
  "capacity_hp" REAL /* Maximum capacity of the pump in horsepower */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the pump */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the pump */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the pump */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the pump */,
  "fluid_type" TEXT /* Type of fluid the pump is designed to handle */,
  "operating_pressure_range" TEXT /* Operating pressure range of the pump */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pump that underwent maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the maintenance performed */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who performed the maintenance */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance in minutes */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the maintenance */,
  "parts_used" TEXT /* Parts used during maintenance */,
  "tools_used" TEXT /* Tools used during maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_pump_id FOREIGN KEY ("pump_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the operator */,
  "shift" TEXT /* Shift assigned to the operator (e.g., Day, Night) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the operator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the operator started working */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the operator stopped working (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "failures" (
  "failure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each failure record */,
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pump that failed */,
  "failure_date" TEXT /* Date when the failure occurred */,
  "failure_cause" TEXT /* Cause of the failure */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution taken to fix the failure */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator on duty when the failure occurred */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the failure in minutes */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the failure */,
  "downtime_hours" REAL /* Downtime in hours caused by the failure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("failure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_failures_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_failures_pump_id FOREIGN KEY ("pump_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related data entry */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., efficiency drop, failure risk) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message describing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator on duty when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES pump_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy usage record */,
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pump consuming energy */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded energy usage */,
  "energy_consumed_kwh" REAL /* Energy consumed by the pump in kilowatt-hours */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator on duty when the energy usage was recorded */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the energy usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_usage_pump_id FOREIGN KEY ("pump_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_usage_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pump_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pump type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the pump type (e.g., Centrifugal, Positive Displacement) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pump type */,
  "max_operating_pressure" REAL /* Maximum operating pressure for the pump type */,
  "min_operating_pressure" REAL /* Minimum operating pressure for the pump type */,
  "max_capacity_lpm" REAL /* Maximum capacity in liters per minute for the pump type */,
  "min_capacity_lpm" REAL /* Minimum capacity in liters per minute for the pump type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operational_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pump for which metrics are calculated */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the metrics aggregation */,
  "avg_efficiency" REAL /* Average efficiency of the pump on that date */,
  "avg_speed_rpm" REAL /* Average speed of the pump in RPM on that date */,
  "avg_torque" REAL /* Average torque applied by the pump on that date */,
  "avg_operating_pressure" REAL /* Average operating pressure of the pump on that date */,
  "avg_vibration_level" REAL /* Average vibration level of the pump on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operational_metrics_pump_id FOREIGN KEY ("pump_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, engineer, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Last password change date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action (e.g., login, data update) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location where the action was performed */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used to perform the action (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was made */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location where the change was made */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used to make the change (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES pump_data ("data_id")
)
